name: shopsphere
description: ShopSphere — multi-vendor e-commerce platform (User, Seller, Admin, Delivery Partner + shared Backend)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend/admin && npm install --prefix frontend/seller && npm install --prefix frontend/user && npm install --prefix frontend/delivery && npm install --prefix frontend/login
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,admin,seller,user,delivery,login -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,white "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/admin" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/seller" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/user" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/delivery" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/login"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix frontend/admin && npm run build --prefix frontend/seller && npm run build --prefix frontend/user && npm run build --prefix frontend/delivery && npm run build --prefix frontend/login
